query:
-- Search by account number pattern or partial name variations
SELECT externalId, name, xeroContactName, status, monthlyRevenue, monthlyCost, serviceCount
FROM customers
WHERE name LIKE '%Mooloolaba%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Zambrero%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Osprey%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Buderim%';

-- Look for unmatched SasBoss services that match the invoice: Standard Support NBN 50/20, UCXcel Essential, eFax
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.provider, s.status,
       s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId, s.customerName, s.locationAddress
FROM services s
WHERE s.status = 'unmatched'
  AND s.provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND (s.planName LIKE '%NBN 50%' OR s.planName LIKE '%Standard Support%' OR s.planName LIKE '%eFax%')
ORDER BY s.planName;

-- Also check if there's a billing item for account 94152 or Mooloolaba Osteopathy
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.contactName, bi.matchStatus, bi.serviceExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%Mooloolaba Osteo%' OR bi.contactName LIKE '%Massage Centre%'
   OR bi.description LIKE '%Standard Support NBN 50%';
